description: Gift set - Wallet and Handkerchief Wondering what to give that special someone as a gift? Your search is over with this classy combination! Sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside your jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out. Comes with a handkerchief Wallet Dimensions: 10 cm x 12 cm Textured leather upper Two-fold wallet with a vertical flap Two main compartments Three card holders on the left fold and one buttonable coin pouch on the right One slip pocket on either side of the fold Three card holders and two id holders on the flap Handkerchief Dimensions: 42 cm x 42 cm White cotton kerchief with coloured stripes at the edges (stripe colour may differ from that in photograph) Care Wipe wallet with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
